name: Sailor
oneLiner: An AI WhatsApp CRM for real estate agents — it sorts leads and runs follow-up around the agent instead of replacing them.
detail: Shipped to production, with architecture audits I ran on my own codebase. Automates the busywork around a real agent (the O-Ring play), not the agent themselves.

name: Stax
oneLiner: A tracker for the routines that actually make you you — health stack as identity, not metrics.
detail: The authenticity-over-performance idea applied to a health app: depth over virality, honest over commercial.

name: Uber Wrapped
oneLiner: Turns a year of your Uber rides into a story told back to you.
detail: Personal data to narrative. Built in code (not a no-code tool).

name: Engin 183 Teacher Co-Pilot
oneLiner: A co-pilot for teachers — lesson support, less busywork.

name: GTM AI
oneLiner: Go-to-market AI tooling that powers Sailor's outreach.
